reviews.comment:
Buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlMDZtZU5REAE

reviews.comment:
Estuve en esta estación y la atención de el playero fue cordial y amabe . Sus baños muy buenos limpios y amplios y la atención del servicompras fue muy buena con buena atención y muy atento  con nosotros volvería a pasar cada vez que pase entre el bolsón y bariloche

(Translated by Google)
I stayed at this station and the attendant was friendly and helpful. The restrooms were very nice, clean, and spacious, and the convenience store staff were very attentive and helpful. I would definitely stop by again whenever I travel between El Bolsón and Bariloche.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Julieta, entiendo que al puntuar nos pusiste 1 estrella por error. Gracias igual y para la próxima, acordate que son 5.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlZy1xWV9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención desde los chicos que atienden en playa hasta la atención del servi compras, todo muy higiénico todo muy bonito hasta la higiene de los sanitarios, muy conforme cada vez que paso por Mascardi 🙌🙌

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the guys who serve on the beach to the customer service, everything very hygienic, everything very nice, even the hygiene of the restrooms, very satisfied every time I go to Mascardi 🙌🙌
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlX1lmTkFnEAE

reviews.comment:
La verdad muy linda experiencia, la atención de los chicos de la playa excelente, el baño impecable, el pibe del servicompras hace un café extraordinario, excelente vista!

(Translated by Google)
It was a really lovely experience, the staff at the beach were excellent, the bathroom was spotless, the guy at the convenience store makes amazing coffee, and the view was fantastic!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlX1lPX3RBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Exelente atencion!!!!! Hermoso como tienen el lugar cada vez que viajamos a bariloche y pasamos por la estacion nos atienden como mucha coordialidad
Los baños exelente!!!
Muy recomendable si viajas hacervuna parada para comprar en el serviclub y cargar agua para los mates que acompañan  nuestro viaje!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! The place is beautiful; every time we travel to Bariloche and pass through the station, they treat us with such warmth and friendliness. The restrooms are excellent! Highly recommended if you're traveling to stop and buy something at the convenience store and fill up your water bottles for the mate we enjoy on our trip!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlX2ZtS25BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion los playeros el servicompras ul lujo la atencion y buena predispocicion los baños muy buena igiene paso a diario 4 veses por semana y la verdad muy buena la atencion y el servicio

(Translated by Google)
Very good attention, the beach attendants, the shopping service is a luxury, the attention and good predisposition, the bathrooms are very clean, I come by daily 4 times a week and the attention and service are really good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlX2RtUGR3EAE

reviews.comment:
La atención del playero muy buena, los baños excelentes muy bien mantenidos. El servís compras 10 puntos!!!

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant was very helpful, the restrooms were excellent and very well maintained. The shopping service was top-notch!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlX2VuWWF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Quiero felicitar al personal
Baños impecables
Atención en playa y servicompras de muchísima calidad humana, me quedo corto con las 5 estrellas.
Un placer pasar por esta Ypf aca

(Translated by Google)
I want to congratulate the staff.
The restrooms were spotless. The service at the beach and convenience store was exceptionally friendly; 5 stars doesn't do it justice.
It was a pleasure stopping by this YPF station here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlX2VtUVpREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención si no compras aunque seas socio no te dejan pasar al baño

(Translated by Google)
Very bad service if you don't buy anything, even if you are a member, they won't let you use the bathroom.

reviewReply.comment: Que pena. Deben haber estado limpiando, porque las puertas de los baños siempre están abiertas.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Alejandro por sus dos estrellas. Analizando su promedio de puntuaciones, podemos estar tranquilos.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Last place to stop to buy something if you're going towards El Bolson, there isn't much variety and the prices are the highest.

(Original)
Ultimo lugar para se parar para comprar algo para quem vai sentido elbolson, nao há muitas variedades e os preços os mais altos.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Borá. Los precios están relacionados a la dificultad de proveedores para atender el sitio. Con solo mirar alrededor es fácil comprenderlo.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlOXBQUEZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre es nuestra parada obligada para llenar el termo para tomar mate en el camino hacia El Bolsón, o tomar unos cafés o te a la llegada de Bariloche.

(Translated by Google)
It's always our must-stop to fill up our thermos for mate on the way to El Bolsón, or to have some coffee or tea upon arrival in Bariloche.
